page: Microsoft Azure E128-64as_v7 is an x86_64 architecture server instance belonging to the Easv7 family, powered by a dedicated AMD EPYC 9V45 processor. It features 32 physical cores and 64 vCPUs with multithreading enabled at 2 threads per core. The instance is equipped with 1024.0 GB of RAM, providing a high memory-to-vCPU ratio of 16.0 GB per vCPU. It does not include local storage or integrated GPUs, but it is Premium Storage capable and runs on the Microsoft Hyper-V hypervisor.

In benchmark evaluations, the E128-64as_v7 exhibits strong performance characteristics. Its single-core CPU performance via stress-ng and PassMark CPU scores rank in the top tier. Memory performance is also highly rated, with PassMark memory scores and database operations placing in the top 10%. Large-block memory bandwidth read and write operations achieve strong results in the top 25%, reaching 203.18 GB/sec and 133.05 GB/sec respectively. Single-threaded gzip compression and bzip3 decompression also perform in the top tier.

This instance is highly suited for memory-intensive applications, database operations, and small-to-medium scale LLM inference tasks. Prompt processing and text generation for 135M and 7B parameter models rank in the top tier or strong categories, though performance drops to average for larger 70B models. The lack of local storage requires external storage attachment, which is a key architectural tradeoff to consider for disk-heavy workloads.
description: Microsoft Azure E128-64as_v7 is an x86_64 memory-optimized server instance from the Easv7 family, powered by a dedicated AMD EPYC 9V45 processor. It features 32 physical cores, 64 vCPUs, and 1024.0 GB of RAM, yielding a high resource density of 16.0 GB of memory per vCPU. While it lacks local storage and GPUs, it is Premium Storage capable. Benchmarks indicate top-tier single-core CPU performance, PassMark memory scores, and database operations. Large-block memory read bandwidth reaches 203.18 GB/sec, and write bandwidth reaches 133.05 GB/sec, both ranking in the top 25%. This instance is highly efficient for memory-intensive workloads, database management, and small-to-medium language model inference, though performance scales down to average for very large models.
og_description: Microsoft Azure E128-64as_v7 is an x86_64 memory-optimized server featuring 64 vCPUs, 1024 GB RAM, and an AMD EPYC 9V45 processor, delivering top-tier database and memory performance.
meta_description: Microsoft Azure E128-64as_v7 is an x86_64 memory-optimized server with 64 vCPUs, 1024 GB RAM, and a dedicated AMD EPYC 9V45 processor.
tagline: A memory-optimized x86_64 virtual machine featuring high memory density and top-tier single-core performance for demanding database workloads.
bullet_points: Powered by a dedicated AMD EPYC 9V45 processor with 64 vCPUs and 32 physical cores.
Equipped with 1024.0 GB of RAM, offering a high 16.0 GB per vCPU memory ratio.
Delivers top-tier single-core CPU performance and database operation benchmarks.
Supports Premium Storage for external disk attachment, with no local storage included.
Optimized for memory-intensive workloads, relational databases, and medium-scale LLM inference.
